name: Cajun Cannelloni
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Crawfish tails, cut into small pieces
1 large Link boudin (or smoked sausage), chopped
1 lb Italian sausage, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions: Begin 2 hours ahead. Prepare sauce: Melt butter and mix with olive oil. Add peppercorns, onion, and garlic. Saute for several minutes. Add mushrooms; saute for several more minutes. Add tomato sauce and paste. Simmer for 1 hour or longer. Cook sausages in a pan until well done; add jalapenos and Tabasco. Add crawfish and saute for an additional 5 minutes. Add crab and saute for a few more minutes. Blend Romano, Parmesan, and mozzarella in a mixing bowl with ricotta. Add sausage, crab, and crawfish mixture. Add eggs; mix thoroughly. Cook cannelloni in rapidly boiling water for 7 to 10 minutes or until shells are cooked but firm. Remove shells from water and stuff with the mixture when cool to the touch. Arrange shells in a large greased baking pan. Cover with sauce. Slice remaining mozzarella and arrange on top. Top with grated Parmesan. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes. Put under broiler for the last 5 minutes to brown the cheese topping.
